data.title: Failing integration tests for ref-library-loader (RED phase)
data.description:
As a DSO maintainer, I can run failing integration tests for ref-library-loader.sh before implementation begins, confirming the RED phase of TDD.

Done definitions:
- tests/integration/test-ref-library-loader-integration.sh exists and is executable
- All 6 sub-tests confirmed FAIL (RED) before implementation begins; failing run recorded as ticket comment
- Sub-test (a): corpus-only mode returns corpus-sourced citations in format `> Reference: [Title] (dso:ui-reference:<id>) — [excerpt]`
- Sub-test (b): URL-only mode returns URL-sourced citations in format `> Reference: [Title](url) — [excerpt]`
- Sub-test (c): merge mode returns both formats with verified local-first precedence (corpus entries appear before URL entries in the merged set)
- Sub-test (d): sparse corpus (ref-query returns 3 entries) reallocates up to 5 URL slots without crowd-out
- Sub-test (e): both-unavailable mode generates tasks without citations and no error
- Sub-test (f): UTF-8 multibyte characters in excerpts are never split mid-codepoint (fixture includes CJK + multi-codepoint emoji + flag sequences at boundary positions)

Considerations:
- [Testing] Mock fixture for dso ref-query output + confluence-fetch.sh HTTP stub
- [Testing] UTF-8 fixture includes CJK characters AND multi-codepoint emoji/flag sequences
- [Maintainability] Follow tests/integration runner discovery pattern
